title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: A tutorial demonstrating Claude Design as a replacement for Figma in design workflows. The video covers a four-step framework for building design systems and generating branded landing pages, positioning Claude Design as a junior designer that maintains brand consistency.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master covers Claude Design, an AI design tool from Anthropic that automates design workflows such as design system building, landing page generation, and asset creation. The demonstration walks through a four-step framework: building a design system, generating designs, applying edits, and deploying the results as templates. The value lies in consolidating multiple design tasks into a single AI-driven process, with the design system serving as the foundation that downstream generation and edits build on.
